title: prunella orientalis
intro: Prunella orientalis, also known as Oriental Foxglove or Selfheal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Prunella orientalis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Prunella orientalis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
